headline: Q3 opens with a mild bullish futures lean, but NDX carries Extreme overnight gap risk — a ±1.1% implied swing — with NFP Thursday and July 4 closure amplifying the weekly stakes.
Futures point to a bullish Tuesday open led by tech — but the real test is Thursday's Jobs Report, and SPX $7,408 is the line between cushioned and choppy.
Tech bouncing hard overnight (NQ +1%) but NFP Thursday and a hawkish Fed make this a size-down, confirm-first holiday week — NDX and RUT both rated HIGH for the week.
Tech is the epicenter, not a broad breakdown — watch Sunday ES futures and let PCE Monday plus Warsh Wednesday set the week's direction before committing.
Micron's blockbuster Q3 beat drives bullish pre-open gap lean — but May PCE at 8:30 AM ET is the live override switch.
